ddls:
CREATE TABLE "engine_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database engine */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall performance score */,
  "nov_2018" REAL /* Performance change in November 2018 */,
  "dec_2017" REAL /* Performance change in December 2017 */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "metrics_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metrics */,
  "metrics_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_performance_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the database engine */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database engine */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the engine version */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "is_open_source" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the database engine is open source */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database engine */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the score was recorded */,
  "metrics_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "metrics_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database engine */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in performance */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the change was recorded */,
  "metrics_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "metrics_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_changes_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, product manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database engine accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database engine */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "patch_level" TEXT /* Patch level or hotfix version */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is the latest */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version will be deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_versions_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_performance" (
  "version_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version performance record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine version */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score for the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was recorded */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the performance was recorded */,
  "metrics_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "metrics_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES engine_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "engine_id1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first database engine */,
  "engine_id2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second database engine */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "score_difference" REAL /* Difference in performance scores */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., read speed, write speed) */,
  "comparison_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_comparisons_engine_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id1") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_comparisons_engine_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id2") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database engine */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the performance change */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action taken or recommended in response to the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_alerts_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission FOREIGN KEY ("permission") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the note */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the database engine discussed in the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is private */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last modified */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue discussed in the note has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_notes_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)
